query: high protein breakfast generate a high protein breakfast
recipes:
Recipe Name: Breakfast in a Blender

Ingredients: 1 scoop protein powder, 1/3 cup dry oatmeal, 2/3 cup water or 2/3 cup milk, 1 tablespoon natural almond butter or 1 tablespoon peanut butter, 1 frozen banana, 2 tablespoons unsweetened applesauce, 1 tablespoon flax seed, 1 tablespoon wheat germ, 1/2 cup ice cube

Instructions: Blend all ingredients.

Recipe Name: Breakfast Protein Nog

Ingredients: 1 banana, 1 large egg, 1 1/2 cups milk, 4 tablespoons vanilla whey protein powder

Instructions: Whiz everything in a blender with two tablespoons of fiber and drink your breakfast!

Recipe Name: High protein pancakes recipe

Ingredients: 90g (1 cup) rolled oats, 1 large banana, 20.00 ml chia seeds, 4.00 gm baking powder, 130g (1/2 cup) natural yoghurt, plus 130g (1/2 cup), extra, 4 eggs, 4.40 gm vanilla extract, 195g (1 1/3 cups) frozen berries

Instructions: Step 1, Combine the oats, banana, chia seeds, baking powder, yoghurt, eggs and vanilla in a blender. Blend until smooth., Step 2, Spray a large non-stick frying pan with oil. Heat over medium heat. In batches, add slightly heaped tablespoonfuls of the mixture to the pan and cook for 2 minutes each side or until golden and cooked through. Between batches spray with a little more oil (move pan away from flame before spraying with oil). Repeat to make 12 pancakes in total. Top with berries and extra yoghurt.

Recipe Name: High Protein Pancakes

Ingredients: 1 cup fat-free cottage cheese, 1 cup egg substitute (or 4 eggs), 1 tablespoon canola oil, 1/2 cup fat-free buttermilk, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract, 3/4 cup all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons Splenda granular, 3/4 teaspoon baking powder

Instructions: Coat a frying pan with non-stick spray and heat over medium heat., Put all ingredients, except baking powder, in a blender and blend until smooth., Stir in baking powder., Pour by 1/8 cup measures into pan and cook until bubbles form around the edges then flip., Serve with syrup or fruit preserves., Note: These will have a moist, almost custard, center. Try to keep the pancakes small because of their delicate nature.

Recipe Name: Protein Pancakes

Ingredients: 1 cup almond meal, 1 scoop protein powder, 1 pinch salt, 1 egg, 1 tablespoon honey, 1 cup almond milk, 1 banana, sliced, 1 tablespoon olive oil

Instructions: In a bowl combine the almond meal, protein powder and salt., In another bowl whisk your egg and add in your honey and almond milk., Add oil to a pan on medium heat and caramelize the slices a portion of the banana on both sides for 2 minutes., Pour in the batter, and cook for 2 minutes or until edges start to harden and get all epicly bubbly. Get your flip on and cook for a further minute. Repeat with remaining banana and batter., Serve with your favorite toppings! My favorites are peanut butter and shredded coconut.

Recipe Name: High Protein and Fiber Breakfast

Ingredients: 1 cup nonfat yogurt (I use Dannon Light n Fit), 1/4 cup skim milk, 1/4 cup oat bran, 1/4 cup wheat germ, 1/2 scoop protein powder (I use vanilla), 1 tablespoon peanut butter

Instructions: combine all ingredients and enjoy!

Recipe Name: Protein Pancakes

Ingredients: 1/2 banana, 1 cup quick oats, 1/2 cup cottage cheese, 3 eggs, 1 scoop vanilla protein shake mix, 1 tablespoon baking powder

Instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. Cook on a lightly oiled skillet.

Recipe Name: Oatmeal Protein Pancakes

Ingredients: 6 egg whites, 2 eggs (whole), 1 cup quick oats, 1 tablespoon cinnamon, 1 dash nutmeg, 1 1/2 teaspoons sugar, 1 scoop vanilla protein powder, 1 bananas (optional) or 1/2 cup chopped fruit (optional)

Instructions: Combine eggs, oats, cinnamon, nutmeg, sugar and protein in blender., Pour in cut up fruit., Spray nonstick skillet & heat on medium., Pour 1 large pancake., Let bubble on outer edges & flip (watch carefully as they could burn)., Cook until done on both sides., Serve with butter and syrup.

Recipe Name: Breakfast Egg Casserole - High Protein

Ingredients: 10 eggs, 2 cups cottage cheese, 1 lb monterey jack cheese, grated, 1/2 cup flour, 1/4 cup butter, melted, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 8 ounces diced green chilies, 1/2 cup onion, finely chopped

Instructions: Beat eggs well., Beat in flour until there are no lumps., Add all other ingredients and mix well., Pour into buttered 9" x 13: pan., Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for about 35 minutes.

Recipe Name: High Protein Egg Salad

Ingredients: 6 large eggs, 1/2 cup chopped celery, 1 tablespoon onion, 1/2 cup cottage cheese, 2 tablespoons plain Greek yogurt, 2 tablespoons mayonnaise, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

Instructions: Place eggs in a saucepan and add enough water to cover them by about 1 inch., Bring to a boil, then turn off heat and cover. Let stand for 10 to 12 minutes, then transfer eggs to an ice water bath until cooled, 5 to 10 minutes. Peel eggs and set aside., Add cottage cheese, yogurt, and mayonnaise to a food processor; blend to combine. Add the hard boiled eggs, pulse to incorporate the eggs. Transfer the mixture to a bowl. Stir in the minced celery, and onion. Season with salt and pepper.

Recipe Name: Egg White Protein Pancakes

Ingredients: 1 cup oats, 1 cup low fat cottage cheese, 6 large egg whites, 1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract, 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon

Instructions: Combine all ingredients in a food processor until completely combined., Scoop onto preheated griddle or frying pan, on low to medium heat. It is important to cook these at a low to medium temperature to ensure the insides cook completely. Cook on one side until the top begins to set, then flip and cook for 2-3 more minutes.

Recipe Name: High Protein Pancakes

Ingredients: 2 eggs, 2 tablespoons vital wheat gluten, 1/2 cup cottage cheese, 1 dash cinnamon, 1 teaspoon baking powder, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, cooking spray, as needed

Instructions: Combine all ingredients in blender or food processor. It is imperative that you use a blender or food processor, otherwise it will not be a smooth batter., Heat a pan over medium heat, spray with oil., Pour or spoon about 1/4 cup into a pan, shape into a pancake if needed., These will cook rather slowly, about 2 minutes on each side until slightly browned. Enjoy!

Recipe Name: Breakfast Protein Shake

Ingredients: 1/2 banana, 1/2 cup smooth peanut butter or 1/2 cup crunchy peanut butter, 1/2 cup milk, 6 ice cubes, 1 tablespoon protein powder

Instructions: Throw all ingredients into the blender and blend until smooth.

Recipe Name: Healthy High Protein Fruit Dip

Ingredients: 1/2 cup nonfat Greek yogurt, 1/4 cup peanut butter

Instructions: Combine both ingredients in a bowl., Refrigerate until ready to eat., Serve with apple slices, strawberries, or carrots and celery., If you want something savory, enjoy with a serving of pretzels or crackers.

Recipe Name: High Protein Diet Waffles

Ingredients: 6 egg whites, 1 teaspoon baking powder, 1 dash cinnamon, 1 g Splenda sugar substitute, 1 tablespoon no-sugar-added jam

Instructions: Whisk ingredients into bowl and pour into a waffle maker (make sure you spray non-stick spray)., Pour batter so that it is contained within the grids., Top off with jam or other suggested topping.

Recipe Name: Breakfast Oatmeal Protein Muffins

Ingredients: 1/2 cup rolled oats, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1/2 teaspoon pumpkin pie spice, 1/2 banana, mashed, 1 pinch salt, 2 egg whites, 1 egg

Instructions: Mix together dry ingredients., Mash banana., Add eggs to banana and beat slightly., Add wet ingredients to dry and mix until it is all incorporated., Pour into prepared muffin tins or baking cups., Bake for 16 minutes at 350 degrees.

Recipe Name: Super Healthy Grain Breakfast

Ingredients: 2 ounces porridge oats, 1 cup water, 1 sliced banana (plus 1 peeled and chopped pear, optional)

Instructions: Mix all together in a microwave bowl., Cook for 5 minutes on High.

Recipe Name: High-Protein Instant Breakfast Mix

Ingredients: 3 ounces instant sugar free pudding (recommended chocolate, or butterscotch, vanilla, etc. pudding of choice, This is one large box or tw), 1/3 cup Splenda sugar substitute, 12 scoops protein powder (recommended chocolate powder), 4 scoops vanilla protein powder, 6 cups instant nonfat dry milk powder

Instructions: Mix it all in a big bowl and put it in an air-tight container., Blend 2/3 cup of mix in 12 oz cold water.

Recipe Name: Protein Pancakes

Ingredients: 1 cup rolled oats, 1 cup fat-free cottage cheese, 8 egg whites, 1 teaspoon cinnamon

Instructions: .Blend ingredients in food processor., Pour onto heated pan by the 1/4 Cup, cooking 2-3 minutes per side.

Recipe Name: Protein Powered Oatmeal Breakfast

Ingredients: 1 1/2 cups skim milk, 1/2 cup quick oats, 1/3 cup whey protein (Body Fortress Super Advanced Powder), 1/2 cup blueberries, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, 2 tablespoons almonds (sliced)

Instructions: Boil oats and 1 cup of milk in saucepan for 2 minutes. Add 1/4 cup milk, protein powder and cinnamon. Divide equally between two bowls and garnish with 1/4 cup of blueberries and 1 tablespoon of sliced almonds each. Pour remaining milk equally over both bowls and serve while still warm. Enjoy!
